response:
# Professional Resume Templates

---

## 📄 TEMPLATE 1: Classic/Traditional

---

**[YOUR FULL NAME]**
📍 City, State | 📞 (555) 555-5555 | ✉️ email@email.com | 🔗 LinkedIn URL

---

### PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Results-driven [Job Title] with [X] years of experience in [industry/field]. Proven track record of [key achievement]. Skilled in [top skills]. Seeking to [career goal].

---

### WORK EXPERIENCE

**Job Title** | Company Name | City, State
*Month Year – Month Year*
- Accomplished [X] by doing [Y], resulting in [Z]
- Led a team of [#] to achieve [result]
- Increased/Reduced [metric] by [%] through [action]

**Job Title** | Company Name | City, State
*Month Year – Month Year*
- Achievement-focused bullet point
- Achievement-focused bullet point

---

### EDUCATION

**Degree Name** | University Name | Year
- GPA: X.X (if 3.5+) | Relevant coursework, honors

---

### SKILLS
**Technical:** Skill 1, Skill 2, Skill 3
**Soft Skills:** Leadership, Communication, Problem-solving

---

### CERTIFICATIONS
- Certification Name | Issuing Organization | Year

---
---

## 📄 TEMPLATE 2: Modern/Minimalist

---

# **FIRST LAST**
email@email.com • (555) 555-5555 • LinkedIn • Portfolio

---

## ABOUT ME
One to three sentences summarizing your value proposition and what makes you unique as a candidate.

---

## EXPERIENCE

### 🏢 Company Name
**Your Title** *(Year – Present)*
> Key achievement with measurable result
> Key achievement with measurable result
> Key achievement with measurable result

### 🏢 Previous Company
**Your Title** *(Year – Year)*
> Key achievement
> Key achievement

---

## SKILLS & TOOLS
| Category | Skills |
|----------|--------|
| Software | Excel, Python, Salesforce |
| Design | Figma, Adobe Suite |
| Languages | English, Spanish |

---

## EDUCATION
🎓 **Degree** — University Name, Year

---
---

## 📄 TEMPLATE 3: Entry-Level/Recent Graduate

---

**[NAME]**
City, State | Phone | Email | LinkedIn

---

### OBJECTIVE
Recent [Degree] graduate from [University] seeking a [Position] role where I can apply my skills in [area 1] and [area 2] to contribute to [company type/goal].

---

### EDUCATION
**Bachelor of Science in [Major]**
University Name | Graduation Year
- GPA: X.X | Dean's List | Relevant Courses: Course 1, Course 2

---

### RELEVANT EXPERIENCE / INTERNSHIPS

**Intern/Role Title** | Company | Year
- Assisted with [task], contributing to [outcome]
- Developed [skill] by completing [project]

---

### PROJECTS
**Project Name** | *Tools Used*
- Brief description of what you built/did and the result

---

### SKILLS
Excel | Python | Communication | Teamwork | [Industry Tool]

---

### ACTIVITIES & LEADERSHIP
- Club/Organization | Role | Year

---
---

## ✅ QUICK TIPS

| Do ✅ | Don't ❌ |
|-------|---------|
| Use action verbs | Use "responsible for" |
| Quantify achievements | Include a photo |
| Tailor to each job | Use fancy fonts/colors |
| Keep to 1-2 pages | List every job duty |
| Use consistent formatting | Include references |

---

## 🔑 STRONG ACTION VERBS
**Led** • **Built** • **Increased** • **Reduced** • **Managed** • **Designed** • **Launched** • **Improved** • **Analyzed** • **Delivered**

---

> 💡 **Want me to customize a template for a specific industry, job title, or experience level? Just ask!**
